text:
Tetruss Rig
Tetruss describes its suspension-bondage rig as a lightweight but strong aluminum-alloy, freestanding frame with no wall or ceiling hardware. It says the rig works best in a 10-by-10-foot space. The standard frame is made from lightweight aluminum alloy, supports 300 pounds of dynamic or live load, weighs just over 20 pounds, assembles in minutes, and breaks down for storage. It is made for a standard eight-foot ceiling and can be customized for a lower ceiling. The frame has an eight-foot triangular footprint. Optional accessories include a 44-inch aluminum-alloy spreader bar, leather stirrups, leather cuffs, and a travel bag. The listed uses include suspension bondage, shibari, BDSM play, a sex swing, a spanking bench, a St. Andrew's cross, and non-rope suspension with accessories. The page gives a one-year parts warranty and notes that cuffs and the spreader bar shown in photos are sold separately.
title: Tetruss Rig
